pageContext.name: The Awakening
pageContext.description: The team at its best. It's just like old times.   Sideshow Art Prints and Brian Rood Art present The Awakening Fine Art Print, based on the live-action adaptation of The Umbrella Academy.  Inspired by the premiere season of this hit streaming series, The Awakening shows the fractured super hero family under the proud, monocled gaze of patriarch Sir Reginald Hargreeves. Under his tutelage, the six notably powerful siblings Luther, Diego, Allison, Klaus, Five, and Ben became a team of crimefighters in the public eye. Artist Brian Rood's colorful collage of characters and numbers surrounds the Umbrella Academy's official seal, alongside other allies and antagonists like Pogo the chimp, Mom the robot, and time-traveling hitmen Hazel and Cha-Cha.  Each The Awakening Fine Art Print is hand-signed by artist Brian Rood as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. This quirky super hero artwork is a must-have for fans of The Umbrella Academy.   It's not the end of the world if you don't add this Umbrella Academy art to your collection — oh wait, it actually might be! Avert the apocalypse and bring home The Awakening Fine Art Print by Brian Rood today.
